productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kids Unisex HyperRun Silver Sports Shoes
description: If running is what your little one likes, then there's no better way to hone the skills of those young legs than with this pair of Hyperrun 5 running shoes. Light in weight and well cushioned, kids are sure to find their energy doubling with each stride.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations for enhanced durability and breathabilityTextile inner with a meshed and cushioned inner collar for absolute breathable comfortMeshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfortVelcro closures on the midfoot vamp for a snug, customised FitErgonomically curved and padded Ortholite footbed for all-day comfortadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleMidsolePhylon midsole for an absolutely cushioned ride, lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protectionOutsoleNon-marking rubber outsole for enhanced durability, and has flex grooves for ease of movement Multi-directional lugs and grooves for ultimate grip and tractionScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfoot and anklesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
